generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance StepperMotorCart : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cart movement actuator using TMC4671-Eval motor controller for precise positioning in the gantry crane system"
]

instance StepperMotorHoist : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Hoist movement actuator using TMC4671-Eval motor controller for vertical positioning in the gantry crane system"
]

instance ElectromagnetHoist : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnetic actuator at hoist end for container pickup/drop operations controlled via Arduino-based system"
]

instance PhysicalCraneInterface : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Python-based bidirectional interface enabling trajectory optimization and fault mitigation between physical crane and digital twin"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision encoder measuring hoist swing angle for real-time dynamic compensation in crane control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance AnemometerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Wind speed sensor measuring ambient conditions affecting crane dynamics and trajectory stability"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderCart : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position feedback encoder integrated with stepper motor for precise cart position tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CartPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderHoist : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position feedback encoder integrated with stepper motor for precise hoist position tracking"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HoistPositionDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Data Transmission
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AnemometerSensor
]

instance CartPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderCart
]

instance HoistPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderHoist
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance CraneCADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Autodesk Fusion 360 structural visualization model of the gantry crane for 3D representation and collision detection"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService, TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model representing crane kinematics used for trajectory generation and simulation validation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance ArcadiaSystemModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Capella-based MBSE documentation model capturing system architecture and requirements for the gantry crane digital twin"
]

instance TimeSeriesHistoricalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based TimescaleDB storage for all logged time-series data including sensor readings and trajectory executions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted, CartPositionDataTransmitted, HoistPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataVisualizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance SimulationTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Offline simulation trajectory data generated by the Simulation Service for comparison with real-time executions"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TrajectoryDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TrajectoryDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time trajectory execution data collected from the physical crane system"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CartPositionDataTransmitted, HoistPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ContinuousValidationService
]

// C11: Enablers
instance TimescaleDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "PostgreSQL-based TimescaleDB instance providing centralized time-series data storage and querying capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingApplication, DataVisualizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker enabling asynchronous inter-service communication across digital twin components"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Independent simulation service running offline trajectory validations and control strategy tests"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationTrajectoryData
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Parallel-running service generating optimal trajectories with zero residual swinging for offline optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryDataTransmitted
]

instance DockerContainerization : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker-based containerization platform hosting TimescaleDB, MQTT Broker, and Grafana dashboard services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TimescaleDatabase, MQTTBroker, GrafanaDashboard
]

instance PythonRuntime : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python execution environment hosting all digital twin services including gantrylib module and control applications"
    DTDFVocab:enables PhysicalCraneInterface, TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization platform displaying real-time crane state, historical data, and validation metrics"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataLoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Application responsible for collecting and storing all time-series data from physical sensors in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service computing optimal trajectories using kinematic models to minimize swinging and improve efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time service comparing executed trajectories with simulated trajectories using distance metrics and deviation thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationAlertAction, TrajectoryDeviationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offline simulation environment validating control strategies and trajectory executions against kinematic models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationValidationInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing Grafana-based dashboards for monitoring crane state, historical trends, and validation results"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalMonitoringInsight
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Time-series classification service identifying anomalies in crane behavior including motor failures and sensor drift"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertAction, PredictiveMaintenanceInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically generated optimal trajectories with zero residual swinging for crane operations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ValidationAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alerts triggered when trajectory deviations exceed predefined thresholds"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance TrajectoryDeviationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Quantitative measurement of deviation between executed and simulated trajectories for continuous validation"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Post-hoc analysis of time-series data enabling trend identification and wear pattern analysis"
]

instance OperationalMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane state parameters including positions, speeds, and environmental conditions"
]

instance FaultAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated alerts for detected faults including motor failures and sensor drift conditions"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of historical data to predict maintenance needs based on wear patterns and operational conditions"
]

instance SimulationValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Results from offline simulations validating control strategies against kinematic models and real-world data"
]

// C18: Environment
instance GantryCraneEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical environment containing all components of the lab-scale gantry crane system"
    base:contains CraneFrame, StepperMotorCart, StepperMotorHoist, ElectromagnetHoist, ArduinoControlSystem
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Virtual environment containing all digital twin components and services"
    base:contains TimescaleDatabase, MQTTBroker, SimulationService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, PythonRuntime
]

// C19: Components
instance CraneFrame : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Structural framework supporting all moving components of the gantry crane system"
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneEnvironment
]

instance ArduinoControlSystem : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Microcontroller-based system integrating sensors and controllers for real-time adjustments and bidirectional communication"
    base:isContainedIn GantryCraneEnvironment
]

// Development Process
instance DevelopmentProcess : DTDFVocab:Process [
    base:desc "Iterative development process for the digital twin including initialization, extension, and adaptation stages"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment GantryCraneEnvironment, DigitalTwinEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital twin influences the physical system through:
  - **Optimal trajectory generation** via the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which uses a kinematic model to compute trajectories with minimal residual swinging.
  - **Simulation-based control adjustments** via the **Simulation Service**, enabling offline testing of control strategies.
  - **Operator alerts** via the **Dashboard (Grafana)** when continuous validation thresholds are breached, prompting manual intervention.
  The **Control Application** executes virtual-generated commands (e.g., motor movements) via the **Physical Crane Interface**."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates at **real-time synchronization** with the physical system, with:
  - **Sensor data acquisition** at high frequency (exact rate not specified but implied to be sub-second for swing angle and motor feedback).
  - **Continuous validation** running in real-time to compare executed trajectories with simulated trajectories.
  - **Trajectory generation** and simulation services operating at **millisecond-to-second time scales** for optimal control.
  The **Logging Application** records data at a configurable rate (likely aligned with sensor sampling frequency)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is organized as follows:
  - **Physical System**: Comprises the **Physical Crane**, **Physical Crane Interface**, **Control Application**, **Logging Application**, and **Human Machine Interface (HMI)**.
  - **Digital Twin Layer**: Includes **Database**, **Dashboard**, **Trajectory Generator Service**, **Simulation Service**, **Continuous Validation Service**, and **MQTT Broker**.
  - **Deployment**: All Python services run locally on a personal computer, while containerized services (Database, MQTT, Dashboard) are managed via **Docker Compose**.
  - **Data Flow**: Physical sensors → **Physical Crane Interface** → **Logging Application** (TimescaleDB) → **Services** (Trajectory Generator, Simulation, Validation) → **Dashboard** (Grafana) → Operator.
  The system follows a **modular, service-oriented architecture** with loose coupling between components."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the **as-operated** lifecycle stage of the physical system, focusing on:
  - **Runtime monitoring**: Continuous validation and fault detection during operation.
  - **Post-hoc analysis**: Historical data logging for trend analysis and maintenance planning.
  The system does not explicitly model the **as-designed** (CAD) or **as-manufactured** stages, though CAD models are included for visualization and kinematic simulations. The digital twin is primarily used for **operational optimization and fault diagnosis**."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Continuous validation**: Real-time comparison of executed trajectories with simulated trajectories using distance metrics (e.g., Euclidean distance between actual and predicted paths).
  - **Threshold-based alerts**: Operators are notified if deviations exceed predefined thresholds (e.g., swing angle error margins).
  - **Simulation-based validation**: The **Simulation Service** replicates physical behavior for offline testing of control strategies.
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Implicit in trajectory generation (kinematic models account for motor dynamics and wind effects).
  No explicit mention of formal uncertainty quantification (e.g., Bayesian methods) or model calibration procedures."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The technical connection between the physical and digital twin uses:
  - **MQTT protocol** (Eclipse Mosquitto broker) for asynchronous messaging between services and the physical system.
  - **Python-based interfaces**: **Physical Crane Interface** bridges Arduino sensors/controllers to digital twin services.
  - **Shared database (TimescaleDB)**: Centralized storage for sensor data, trajectory logs, and validation results.
  - **Local network**: All components (physical crane, PC, Docker containers) communicate over a **local Ethernet/Wi-Fi network** (exact protocol not specified beyond MQTT)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is hosted and deployed on:
  - **Physical Crane**: Runs on a **personal computer** (local deployment).
  - **Containerized Services**: **TimescaleDB**, **MQTT Broker**, and **Grafana Dashboard** are containerized using **Docker** and managed via **docker-compose**.
  - **Python Services**: All other services (e.g., **gantrylib**, **Trajectory Generator**) run as native Python applications on the same PC.
  The system requires minimal infrastructure: a PC with Docker installed and physical crane connectivity."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "The system supports limited horizontal integration:
  - **No explicit external DTs**: The digital twin operates in isolation (no mention of federated twins or cross-system data sharing).
  - **Teaching extensions**: Expanded to include **harbor systems** (container identification) and **ship digital twins** (buoyancy models) for educational purposes, but these are not part of the core exemplar.
  - **Sensor data**: Primarily sourced from the **Arduino** and **motor controllers**; no integration with external IoT platforms or third-party systems is documented."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Data ownership and privacy are not explicitly addressed in the documents:
  - **No mention of data ownership**: It is unclear whether data belongs to the PT owner or the DT service provider.
  - **No privacy mechanisms**: No encryption, access controls, or anonymization protocols are described for sensor data or logs.
  - **Open-source license**: The exemplar is released under the **MIT license**, but this does not specify data ownership or usage rights.
  Assumed to follow standard open-source practices (e.g., no proprietary claims), but no formal policies are outlined."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to the following standards and conventions:
  - **CAD**: Autodesk Fusion 360 for structural modeling.
  - **MBSE**: Arcadia models in **Capella** for systems engineering documentation.
  - **Database**: TimescaleDB (PostgreSQL-compatible) for time-series storage.
  - **Messaging**: MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) for inter-service communication.
  - **No formal DT frameworks**: Unlike exemplars using **Eclipse Ditto** or **BaSyx**, this system uses **ad-hoc Python/MQTT-based architecture**.
  The **C4 Model** is used for architectural documentation but not as a standard."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations are minimal and implicit:
  - **No remote operation**: The digital twin does not execute remote commands on the physical crane; all actions require operator confirmation via the **Human Machine Interface**.
  - **Local deployment**: All components run on a personal computer with no cloud or external network exposure (beyond local MQTT).
  - **Alerting only**: Safety-critical actions (e.g., emergency stops) are not automated; operators intervene based on **dashboard alerts**.
  - **No cybersecurity measures**: No mention of authentication, encryption, or intrusion detection for sensor/data streams.
  The system prioritizes **research/educational use** over industrial safety standards (e.g., IEC 62443)."
]
